greetings.response: Hello! I'm the Payroll Archive Assistant. I can help you search for employees, find historical documents like W-2s and paystubs, or fulfill document requests. How can I assist you today?

I can help you with the following:

• **Search employees** by name, Kelly ID, or last 4 SSN
• **Find documents** such as W-2s and paystubs for any year from 2019–2024
• **Preview, download, or email** documents to employees
• **Package multiple documents** for legal or tax requests
• **Check archive health** and review audit logs

Just type your request in plain language!

employeeLookup.responseTemplate: I found {matchCount} result(s) for "{query}". Here are the matching employees:
employeeLookup.noResultResponse: I couldn't find any employees matching "{query}". Please check the spelling or try searching by Kelly ID or last 4 SSN.

employeeLookup.responseTemplate: I found employee {employeeName} (Kelly ID: {kellyId}). Would you like to view their documents?
employeeLookup.noResultResponse: No employee found with Kelly ID "{query}". Please verify the ID and try again.

employeeLookup.responseTemplate: I found employee {employeeName} matching the last 4 SSN digits provided. For security, the full Tax ID is masked as {maskedTaxId}.
employeeLookup.noResultResponse: No employee found matching those SSN digits. Please verify and try again.

ambiguousResults.responseTemplate: I found {matchCount} employees matching "{query}". Could you help me narrow it down?
clarificationPrompts: Can you provide the Kelly ID?
Do you know the last 4 digits of their SSN?
Which location — Troy, MI; Detroit, MI; Chicago, IL; or Austin, TX?

ambiguousResults.responseTemplate: I couldn't find any results for "{query}". Here are some suggestions:
suggestions: Check the spelling of the employee name
Try searching by Kelly ID (e.g., K100234)
Try searching by last 4 SSN digits
Verify the employee is in the archive (years 2019–2024)

documentSearch.responseTemplate: Here are the W-2 documents for {employeeName}:
documentSearch.noResultResponse: No W-2 documents found for {employeeName}. The document may not have been ingested yet or may be flagged as missing.

documentSearch.responseTemplate: Here are the paystub records for {employeeName}:
documentSearch.noResultResponse: No paystub records found for {employeeName} for the requested period.

documentSearch.responseTemplate: Here are the documents for {employeeName} for tax year {year}:
documentSearch.noResultResponse: No documents found for {employeeName} for year {year}. The archive covers years 2019–2024 for W-2s and recent quarters for paystubs.

documentSearch.responseTemplate: Here is the complete document archive for {employeeName}. They have {documentCount} document(s) on file:
documentSearch.noResultResponse: No documents found for this employee in the archive.

documentSearch.responseTemplate: The requested document ({documentType} for {year}) is currently marked as missing for {employeeName}. This may be due to an ingestion issue or a data exception.

fulfillment.responseTemplate: Opening preview for {documentType} ({year}) for {employeeName}. This action has been logged for audit purposes.

fulfillment.confirmationPrompt: Please confirm: You are about to download {fileName}. This action will be recorded in the audit log. Proceed?
fulfillment.successResponse: Download initiated for {fileName}. The audit log has been updated.
fulfillment.deniedResponse: You do not have permission to download documents. Your role ({userRole}) does not include download access. This attempt has been logged.

fulfillment.confirmationPrompt: Please confirm: You are about to email {fileName} to {recipientEmail}. This action will be recorded in the audit log. Proceed?
fulfillment.successResponse: Email sent successfully. {fileName} has been delivered to {recipientEmail}. The audit log has been updated.
fulfillment.deniedResponse: You do not have permission to email documents. Your role ({userRole}) does not include email access. This attempt has been logged.

fulfillment.responseTemplate: Preparing a document package for {employeeName} containing {documentCount} document(s) across {yearRange}.
fulfillment.confirmationPrompt: Please confirm: You are about to package {documentCount} document(s) for {employeeName}. This action will be recorded in the audit log. Proceed?
fulfillment.successResponse: Document package created successfully with {documentCount} document(s). The audit log has been updated.
fulfillment.deniedResponse: You do not have permission to package documents. Your role ({userRole}) does not include package access. This attempt has been logged.

auditQueries.responseTemplate: Here are the recent audit log entries. There are {eventCount} events recorded:
Here are the access events for {employeeName}'s documents:
auditQueries.noResultResponse: No access events found for {employeeName}'s documents in the audit log.

auditQueries.responseTemplate: There are {exceptionCount} unresolved exceptions in the archive:
auditQueries.noResultResponse: No unresolved exceptions found. The archive is in good health.

accessDenied.responseTemplate: Access denied. Your role ({userRole}) does not have permission to {action}. If you believe this is an error, please contact your supervisor or the system administrator.
You have permission to {allowedActions}, but {action} requires additional authorization. Please contact your supervisor for elevated access.

confirmations.responseTemplate: Request cancelled. No action has been taken. How else can I help you?

errors.responseTemplate: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that request. Could you try rephrasing? Here are some things I can help with:
suggestions: Search for an employee (e.g., "Find John Smith")
Fulfill a request (e.g., "Email the W-2 to the employee")

errors.responseTemplate: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request. Please try again. If the issue persists, contact the system administrator.
The requested document is currently unavailable. It may be missing from the archive or flagged with an exception. Please check the archive health dashboard for more details.

contextualFollowUps.responseTemplate: Would you like to do anything else with {employeeName}'s records?
You've previewed {documentType} ({year}) for {employeeName}. What would you like to do next?
Download complete for {fileName}. Is there anything else you need?
Email sent successfully to {recipientEmail}. Is there anything else I can help with?
Document package created with {documentCount} file(s). Would you like to do anything else?

naturalLanguageExamples.query: Show me all documents for employee K100456
Email Sarah Johnson her latest paystub
Download the 2023 W-2 for employee with SSN ending 5678
Package all W-2s from 2019 to 2024 for David Wilson
What exceptions are in the archive?
Find the paystub for Q1 2025 for Patricia Thomas
